name: twemproxy
explanation: Twemproxy (nutcracker) exposes a stats monitoring port that emits a single JSON document immediately upon TCP connect (no request needed). The check just opens a socket to host:port, drains the response, and parses it. No authentication, no path negotiation. A generic TCP-banner probe that opens a connection and verifies the response decodes as JSON containing the well-known top-level keys (service:nutcracker, source, version, total_connections) is sufficient. The conventional stats port is 22222 per upstream documentation, although the spec example/code default is 2222.
notes: Pattern C (TCP banner / known protocol). The probe must try both 22222 (upstream-documented default) and 2222 (Datadog spec example default) since both are in active use.
